_comment: Channels the scrape helper learns from. EDIT THESE TO YOUR NICHE. The example set below is the cold-email / AI-automation / lead-gen space (all public accounts and communities). 'reddit' = subreddit names without the 'r/'. 'linkedin' = full public profile URLs. The skill works without scraping at all (it ships references/winning-patterns.md); this list only matters when you run scripts/scrape-top-posts.ts to refresh that playbook.
